item.title: Why Did QURE Stock Almost Halve Pre-Market Today?

item.title: Why Is AES Stock Falling Today?

item.title: Morgan Stanley Reinstates Nvidia As Top Chip Pick, Sees ‘Surprisingly Good Entry Point’
item.description: Analyst Joseph Moore reinstated Nvidia as the firm’s top choice in the sector, replacing Micron Technology.

item.title: SPY On Track To Fall Below 100-DMA For First Time In Nine Months – Retail Braces For Prolonged Volatility

item.title: US-Israel-Iran War: IAEA Chief Warns Of Evacuating Areas ‘Larger Than Major Cities’ As Nuclear Risks Loom
item.description: Speaking at the IAEA Board of Governors Meeting, Grossi warned that while no radiation spikes have been detected, continued hostilities could endanger...
